text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship's quest to discover Eden, the
Umamusume utopia described in the Book of
Secrets, has brought her to an unknown land.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But unfortunately, she doesn't know how to get
back home. That's bad news for both of us, since
she brought me along against my will.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The prospect of staying here forever is not
exactly exciting. Is this how Gold Ship's brilliant
racing career begins?
